'''Donatellinsar R'a Pereriansa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Elomin/Legends|Elomin]] that served as Mine Director of [[Ryannar N'on Dikasterar]], the Elomin who discovered the [[Elom/Legends|Elom]].
